name: LCB155 LED
comment: LCB155 LED Bar Pixel Control: The LCB155 is a LED bar with 12x 12W RGBAW-UV LEDs. The LEDs can be programmed in single pixels for stunning chase effects. While using the fixture in stand-alone mode there are pre-programmed shows that you can run automatically or sound activated, pick from the preset colour macros or create your own mixture of colours in RGBAW-UV mode. The extra powerconnector output enables you to simply link the power of multiple units together into a single socket.

The extra powerconnector output enables you to simply link the power of multiple units together into a single socket.
